name: Util.Concurrent.Copies

documentation.description: The Atomic protected type defines an element which can be obtained and changed atomically. The default Ada construct: Val1 := Val2; does not guarantee atomicity of the copy (assignment) and the possible invocation of the Adjust operation on Val1. Atomicity is achieved by this protected type through the Get and Set methods.

The Atomic protected type defines an element which can be obtained and changed atomically. The default Ada construct: Val1 := Val2; does not guarantee atomicity of the copy (assignment) and the possible invocation of the Adjust operation on Val1. Atomicity is achieved by this protected type through the Get and Set methods.
